title: chargeback — realtime broadcast channels
description: Three broadcast channel families. Tenant-level for admin dashboards (chargeback lifecycle stream); pending-evidence for defenders' dashboards; rate-alerts for merchant-account risk visibility. Reverb (Laravel Reverb) is the default transport; the notifications module handles fanout. NO customer-level broadcast channel exists — chargebacks are admin-only surface (card network rules prohibit surfacing chargeback state to customers on most networks).

channels.name: tenant.{tenantId}.chargebacks
channels.description: Tenant-wide chargeback lifecycle stream. Sink for admin dashboards. Broadcasts every chargeback lifecycle event (filed / evidence_requested / evidence_submitted / under_review / won / lost / expired / accepted_refund / provider_error / provider_reconciled) at tenant level.
channels.notes: Payload trimmed to non-confidential fields (see data-classes.json). Confidential fields (amount_cents, currency, fee_cents, provider_metadata) are omitted for readers without chargebacks.view-financials — the frontend re-fetches the full detail via HTTP when a user with financial permission drills in.

channels.name: tenant.{tenantId}.chargebacks.pending-evidence
channels.description: Evidence-defenders' queue stream. Powers the real-time pending-evidence dashboard. Fires when a chargeback enters pending_evidence + when it leaves (evidence_submitted / accepted_refund / expired / manually marked lost). Enables live queue updates without polling — actionable for defenders monitoring approaching deadlines.
channels.notes: Higher-signal-to-noise than the tenant.{id}.chargebacks channel because it only carries evidence-defense-relevant events. Defenders subscribe to this channel + not the full stream.

channels.name: tenant.{tenantId}.chargebacks.rate-alerts
channels.description: Merchant-account risk stream. Powers the real-time rate-threshold-alerts dashboard. Fires when ChargebackRateThresholdExceeded fires (rate crossed VDMP/MDMP threshold) OR when rate clears back below threshold. High-signal — every fire is actionable.
channels.notes: Very low volume — MonitorChargebackRateJob is nightly, so at most one alert per tenant per network per night. Payload includes current_rate_percent + threshold_percent + days_over_threshold + prevention recommendations.
